fields.name: SMOD
fields.description: Serial MODe: When set to logic 1, the baud rate of the Debug UART is doubled

Interrupt Controller.name: FIT

fields.name: RESET
fields.description: Reset: Set to logic 1, Reset defines that the bits set to logic 1 in the write command are set to logic 0 in the register.

fields.name: WCOL_IRQ
fields.description: Write COLlision IRQ: This bit is set to logic 1 when the transmitted part of the FIFO is already full (TFF is set to logic 1) and a new character is written by the CPU in the data register.

fields.name: TWLL_IRQ
fields.description: Transmit WaterlLevelLow IRQ: This bit is set to logic 1 when the number of bytes stored into the Transmit FIFO is equal or smaller than the threshold TWaterlevel.

fields.name: TFF_IRQ
fields.description: Transmit FIFO Full IRQ: This is set to logic 1 if the transmitted part of the FIFO is full.

fields.name: RWLH_IRQ
fields.description: Receive WaterLevel High IRQ: This bit is set to logic 1 when the number of bytes stored into the Receive FIFO is greater or equal to the threshold RWaterlevel.

fields.name: ROVR_IRQ
fields.description: Read OVeRrun IRQ: This bit indicates that a read overrun has occured. It occurs when the receiver part of the FIFO is full and a new data transfer is completed. Then the new received data is lost and ROVR_IRQ is set.

fields.name: RFF_IRQ
fields.description: Receive FIFO Full IRQ: This bit is set to logic 1 if the received part of the FIFO is full.

quality_issues: all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)

Interrupt Controller.name: FITEN
Interrupt Controller.description: Enables or disables interrupt requests to the CPU and resets FIFO content.

fields.name: TFLUSH
fields.description: When set to 1, the pointer of the Transmit FIFO is reset.

fields.name: RFLUSH
fields.description: When set to 1, the pointer of the Receive FIFO is reset.

Interrupt Controller.name: IE0

fields.name: IE0_7
fields.description: Global interrupt enable When set to logic 1, the interrupts can be enabled. When set to logic 0, all the interrupts are disabled.

fields.name: IE0_6
fields.description: NFC-WI counter interrupt enable When set to logic 1, NFC-WI interrupt is enabled. See Table 164 on page 126.

fields.name: IE0_5
fields.description: Timer2 interrupt enable When set to logic 1, Timer2 interrupt is enabled. See Table 36 on page 28.

fields.name: IE0_4
fields.description: Debug UART interrupt enable When set to logic 1, Debug UART interrupt is enabled. See Table 49 on page 33.

fields.name: IE0_3
fields.description: Timer1 interrupt enable When set to logic 1, Timer1 interrupt is enabled. See Table 23 on page 23.

fields.name: IE0_2
fields.description: P33_INT1 interrupt enable When set to logic 1, P33_INT1 pin interrupt is enabled. See Table 23 on page 23. The polarity of P33_INT1 can be inverted (see Table 73 on page 49).

fields.name: IE0_1
fields.description: Timer0 interrupt enable When set to logic 1, Timer0 interrupt is enabled. See Table 23 on page 23.

fields.name: IE0_0
fields.description: P32_INT0 interrupt enable When set to logic 1, P32_INT0 pin interrupt is enabled. See Table 23 on page 23.

fields.name: P3_5
fields.description: Writing to P3[5] writes the corresponding value to P35 pin according to the configuration mode defined by P3CFGA[5] and P3CFGB[5].

fields.name: P3_4
fields.description: When P34 alternate function SIC_CLK is not used, writing to P3[4] writes the corresponding value to P34 pin according to the configuration mode defined by P3CFGA[4] and P3CFGB[4].

fields.name: P3_3
fields.description: Writing to P3[3] writes the corresponding value to P33_INT1 pin according to the configuration mode defined by P3CFGA[3] and P3CFGB[3].

fields.name: P3_2
fields.description: Writing to P3[2] writes the corresponding value to P32_INT0 pin according to the configuration mode defined by P3CFGA[2] and P3CFGB[2].

fields.name: P3_1
fields.description: When the P31 pin alternate function UART_TX is not used, writing to P3[1] writes the corresponding value to P31 pin according to the configuration mode defined by P3CFGA[1] and P3CFGB[1].

fields.name: P3_0
fields.description: When the P30 pin alternate function UART_RX is not used, writing to P3[0] writes the corresponding value to P30 pin according to the configuration mode defined by P3CFGA[0] and P3CFGB[0].

fields.name: P3CFGB_5
fields.description: In conjuction with P3CFGA[5], it configures the functional mode of P35.

fields.description: In conjuction with P3CFGA[3], it configures the functional mode of P33_INT1.

fields.name: P3CFGB_2
fields.description: In conjuction with P3CFGA[2], it configures the functional mode of P32_INT0.

fields.name: P3CFGB_1
fields.description: In conjuction with P3CFGA[1], it configures the functional mode of P31.

fields.name: P3CFGB_0
fields.description: In conjuction with P3CFGA[0], it configures the functional mode of P30.

FIFO.name: RWL
FIFO.description: FIFO Receive Waterlevel: Controls the threshold of the FIFO in reception

fields.name: RWATERLEVEL
fields.description: Overflow threshold of the Receive FIFO to set a warning

FIFO.name: TWL
FIFO.description: FIFO Transmit Waterlevel: Controls the threshold of the FIFO in transmission

fields.name: TWATERLEVEL
fields.description: Underflow threshold of the Transmit FIFO to set a warning

FIFO.name: FIFOFS
FIFO.description: FIFO Transmit FreeSpace: Status of the number of characters which can still be loaded in the FIFO

fields.name: TRANSMITFREESPACE
fields.description: Number of bytes the CPU can still load into the FIFO until full

FIFO.name: FIFOFF
FIFO.description: Number of bytes received in the FIFO

fields.name: RECEIVE_FULLNESS
fields.description: Number of bytes received in the FIFO

FIFO.name: SFF

fields.name: FIFO_EN
fields.description: Fifo Enable: Set to logic 1 this bit enables the FIFO manager clock (CPU_CLK). Set to logic 0 the clock remains low.

fields.name: TWLL
fields.description: Transmit WaterlLevelLow: This bit is set to logic 1 when the number of bytes stored into the Transmit FIFO is equal or smaller than the threshold TWaterlevel.

fields.name: TFF
fields.description: Transmit FIFO Full: This is set to logic 1 if the transmit part of the FIFO is full. It is set to logic 0 when a transfer is completed.

fields.name: TFE
fields.description: Transmit FIFO Empty: This bit indicates when the transmit part of the FIFO is empty. It is set to logic 0 when the CPU writes a character in the data register.

fields.name: RWLH
fields.description: Receive WaterLevel High : This bit is set to logic 1 when the number of bytes stored into the Receive FIFO is greater or equal to the threshold RWaterlevel.

fields.name: RFF
fields.description: Receive FIFO Full: This bit is set to logic 1 if the receive part of the FIFO is full. It is set to logic 0 by reading the FDATA register.

fields.name: RFE
fields.description: Receive FIFO Empty: This bit indicates when the receive part of the FIFO is empty. Set to logic 1, when the Receive FIFO is empty. Set to logic 0, when the Receive FIFO contains at least 1 byte.

quality_issues: all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)

FIFO.description: Provides transmitted and received data bytes; write pushes to transmit FIFO, read pops from receive FIFO.

fields.name: FDATA
fields.description: Writing to FDATA writes to the transmit buffer; reading reads from the receive buffer.

FIFO.name: FSIZE
FIFO.description: Defines the size of the Receive FIFO.

CIU.name: CIU_Mode
CIU.description: Defines general modes for transmitting and receiving.

fields.name: MSBFIRST
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the CRC co-processor calculates the CRC with MSB first. The bit order in the registers CRCResultMSB and the CIU_CRCResultLSB is reversed. Note: During RF communication this bit is ignored.

fields.name: DETECTSYNC
fields.description: If set to logic 1, the CIU waits for the F0h byte before the receiver is activated and F0h byte is added as a Sync-byte for transmission. Valid only for 106 kbit/s during NFCIP-1.

fields.name: TXWAITRF
fields.description: Set to logic 1 the transmitter in Reader/Writer or Initiator mode for NFCIP-1 can only be started, if an own RF field is generated (i.e. Tx1RFEn and/or Tx2RFen is set to logic 1).

fields.name: RXWAITRF
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the counter for RxWait starts only, if an external RF field is detected in Target mode for NFCIP-1 or in Card Operating mode.

fields.name: POLSIGIN
fields.description: PolSigin defines the polarity of the SIGIN pin. Set to logic 1, the polarity of SIGIN pin is active high. Set to logic 0 the polarity of SIGIN pin is active low.

fields.name: MODEDET_OFF
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the internal Data Mode Detector is switched off. The Data Mode Detector is only active during the AutoColl command.

fields.name: CRCPRESET
fields.description: Defines the preset value for the CRC co-processor for the CalCRC command.

CIU.description: Controls bits to enable and disable the passing of interrupt requests.

fields.name: SIGINACT_IEN
fields.description: Allows the SIGIN active interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: MODEI_EN
fields.description: Allows the mode interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: CRCI_EN
fields.description: Allows the CRC interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: RFON_IEN
fields.description: Allows the RF field on interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: RFOFF_IEN
fields.description: Allows the RF field off interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: SIGINACT_IEN
fields.description: Allows the SIGIN active interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: MODEI_EN
fields.description: Allows the mode interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: CRCI_EN
fields.description: Allows the CRC interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: RFON_IEN
fields.description: Allows the RF field on interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

fields.name: RFOFF_IEN
fields.description: Allows the RF field off interrupt request to be propagated to CIU_IRQ_0.

CIU.name: CIU_CommIrq
CIU.description: Interrupt request flags for CIU communication

CIU.name: CIU_DivIrq
CIU.description: Interrupt request flags for CIU division

CIU.name: CIU_Error
CIU.description: Error flags showing the error status of the last command executed.

fields.name: WRERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1 when data is written into the FIFO by the 80C51 during the AutoColl command or MFAuthent command or if data is written into the FIFO by the 80C51 during the time between sending the last bit on the RF interface and receiving the last bit on the RF interface.

fields.name: TEMPERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the internal temperature sensor detects overheating. In this case the antenna drivers are switched off automatically.

fields.name: RFERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if in active communication mode the counterpart does not switch on the RF field in time as defined in NFCIP-1 standard.

fields.name: BUFFEROVFL
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the 80C51 or the internal state machine tries to write data into the FIFO buffer although the FIFO buffer is already full.

fields.name: COLLERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if a bit-collision is detected. It is cleared automatically at receiver start phase.

fields.name: CRCERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if RxCRCEn in CIU_RxMode register is set to logic 1 and the CRC calculation fails. It is cleared automatically at receiver start-up phase.

fields.name: PARITYERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1, if the parity check has failed. It is cleared automatically at receiver start-up phase.

fields.name: PROTOCOLLERR
fields.description: Set to logic 1 if protocol errors occur (e.g., SOF incorrect, byte length violation, wrong initiator bit, etc.).

CIU.name: CIU_Status1
CIU.description: Contains status flags of the CRC, Interrupt Request System and FIFO buffer.

fields.name: CIU_IRQ_1
fields.description: Indicates if any CIU_IRQ_1 source requests attention (subject to CIU_CommIEn and CIU_DivIEn enable flags).

fields.name: CRCOK
fields.description: Set to logic 1, the CRC result is zero. Undefined for data transmission/reception; use CRCERR in CIU_Error register.

fields.name: CRCREADY
fields.description: Set to logic 1 when the CRC calculation has finished (valid after CalcCRC command).

fields.name: CIU_IRQ_0
fields.description: Indicates if any CIU_IRQ_0 source requests attention (subject to CIU_CommIEn and CIU_DivIEn enable flags).

fields.name: TRUNNING
fields.description: Set to logic 1 while the CIU timer is running.

fields.name: RFON
fields.description: Set to logic 1 if an external RF field is detected.

fields.name: HIALERT
fields.description: Set to logic 1 when the FIFO buffer length exceeds the high alert threshold.

fields.name: LOALERT
fields.description: Set to logic 1 when the FIFO buffer length falls below the low alert threshold.

CIU.name: CIU_BitFraming
CIU.description: Adjustments for bit oriented frames (write only)

CPU Core.name: DPL
quality_issues: address 0x82 not found in register summary table

CPU Core.name: DPH
quality_issues: address 0x83 not found in register summary table

fields.name: hsu_enable
fields.description: Enable HSU clock. When 1, HSU is enabled. When 0, HSU is disabled.

fields.name: porpulse_latched
fields.description: Indicates that a reset has been generated. When set to logic 1, indicates that the system has been reset. The firmware can write a “0” during the firmware reset sequence.

fields.name: enable_pdselif
fields.description: Indicates that a reset has been generated. When set to logic 1, P33_INT1 directly controls state of host interface pins: if P33_INT1 is set to logic 1, host interface output pins are driven according to selected interface protocol; if P33_INT1 is set to logic 0, host interface output pins are set into high‑impedance state. When set to logic 0, P33_INT1 does not control host interface pins; their state is determined by the selected interface protocol.

fields.name: gpirq_level
fields.description: Selects gpirq interrupt level. When set to logic 1, wake‑up condition is true when gpirq is high. When set to logic 0, wake‑up condition is true when gpirq is low.

fields.name: int1_level
fields.description: Selects P33_INT1 interrupt level. When set to logic 1, wake‑up condition is true when P33_INT1 is low. When set to logic 0, wake‑up condition is true when P33_INT1 is high.

fields.name: int0_level
fields.description: Selects P32_INT0 interrupt level. When set to logic 1, wake‑up condition is true when P32_INT0 is high. When set to logic 0, wake‑up condition is true when P32_INT0 is low.

Misc Config.name: Config I0_I1 register

fields.name: int1_pol
fields.description: When set to logic 1, the value of the P33_INT1 pin is inverted.

fields.name: pad_I1
fields.description: When read this bit gives the state of the I1 pin.

fields.name: POWER_DOWN
fields.description: Power-down bit for Contactless Interface Unit
